strengths: ~19 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map, plus startup experience (WatchUp, RIDE)
Hands-on builder fluency with recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products at scale; AI exposure is limited to ~1 year of agent tooling work
Career ceiling is Senior/Staff Software Developer with no evidence of director-level scope, organizational influence, or strategic advisory to customers and partners
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment) is practitioner-level rather than platform-strategy depth

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Years of engineering experience and builder fluency

response.justification: The role's core competencies are AI strategy leadership, cloud platform vision, director-level influence, and recognized AI expertise. The candidate clears the 15-year experience minimum (working since 2006) and shows genuine builder fluency plus entrepreneurial initiative (GISCollective founder; MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq). However, the résumé shows no shipped AI products or platforms, no publications or recognized standing in AI, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or setting technical direction beyond team level — his highest titles are Senior/Staff developer. High-performance systems work at Dunnhumby and conference talks demonstrate strong engineering, but not the strategic, externally-facing AI leadership this Principal Engineer role demands.
